description: resolve returns the ip for a name or '' when absent; is_cached returns a bool; resolve_cached checks the cache first and returns [ip, True] on a hit or [ip, False] on a miss.
An unknown name resolves to '' everywhere; resolve_cached on an uncached name is a miss ([ip, False]); resolve_cached on a name found nowhere returns ['', False]. Returns a list, not a dict.
resolve_cached reuses resolve and is_cached instead of looping the lists again; clear names; a return on every path.
